subcodes.first_line: O thou who art enkindled with the fire of the love of God! A span of time hath elapsed, and souls have not been stirred by the breezes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اشتعل من نار محبه الله قد مضت مده من الزمان و لم تهتز الارواح بنفحات
subcodes.subjects: @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @the concourse on high, @light and darkness
